chunks.en: When I take notes at work, I usually use my laptop.
chunks.ja: 仕事でメモを取るとき、私はたいていノートパソコンを使います。

chunks.en: I write things down most often during team meetings and phone calls.
chunks.ja: チームの会議や電話の最中に、いちばんよくメモを取ります。

chunks.en: What I usually write is my daily tasks, deadlines, and important numbers.
chunks.ja: 私がよく書き留めるのは、その日のタスク、締め切り、大事な数字です。

chunks.en: I also write short notes about bugs I need to fix later.
chunks.ja: あとで直す必要があるバグについても、短いメモを書いておきます。

chunks.en: To find my notes later, I search by keywords or by date.
chunks.ja: あとでメモを探すときは、キーワードや日付で検索します。

chunks.en: So good notes help me stay organized and remember small details.
chunks.ja: だから良いメモは、私が整理された状態を保ち、細かい点を思い出すのに役立ちます。

outline: Opening: I take notes on my laptop
Point 1: I write during meetings and calls
Point 2: I record tasks, deadlines, and numbers
Wrap-up: I search notes by keyword to stay organized

modelTalk.text: I take notes almost every day at work. I use a small paper notebook most of the time. I like paper because it's fast and simple. Sometimes I use my phone for quick things. When I'm in a meeting, I write down the important points. When I'm on the phone, I write while I listen. I don't write everything. I write the plan, the tasks, and some numbers. I also write names and dates, so I don't forget them. Later, I need to find my notes again. So I write the date on the top of each page. For my phone, I use short titles and simple folders. This way, I can look back fast. My notes aren't perfect, but they help me a lot. That's how I take notes at work every day.

chunks.en: When I take notes at work, I mostly use a note app on my laptop.
chunks.ja: 仕事でメモを取るときは、たいていノートパソコンのメモアプリを使います。

chunks.en: I usually write things down during meetings and while I'm on a phone call.
chunks.ja: たいてい会議中や電話をしている間に、いろいろと書き留めます。

chunks.en: What I usually write is deadlines, small tasks, and important numbers I can't forget.
chunks.ja: 私がよく書くのは、締め切りや細かいタスク、それに忘れられない大事な数字です。

chunks.en: To find my notes later, I add simple tags and search by keyword.
chunks.ja: あとでメモを探すときは、簡単なタグを付けてキーワードで検索します。

chunks.en: So for me, keeping short digital notes helps me stay organized every day.
chunks.ja: だから私にとって、短いデジタルメモを取ることは毎日の整理に役立っています。

outline: Opening: I take notes on my laptop
Point 1: When I write — meetings and calls
Point 2: What I write — deadlines, tasks, numbers
Wrap-up: Tags and search keep me organized

modelTalk.text: At work, I take most of my notes on my phone because it's always with me. Sometimes I use a paper notebook too, when I want to think slowly. For longer stuff, I open my laptop and type everything out. I usually write things down during meetings, so I don't forget what people say. When I'm on the phone, I quickly jot down names and numbers. I write my schedule, my to-do list, and any important dates I need to remember. Later, when I want to find something, I just search for a keyword on my phone. I try to keep my notes tidy, so I put them into simple folders by topic. It's not perfect, but it works for me. Taking notes helps me stay calm and keeps my day from getting messy.
